transformed_query: WITH pts AS (SELECT t.dimension_code AS ticker, m.dimension_code AS metric, dp.time, dp.value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY dp.series_id ORDER BY dp.time DESC) AS rn, dp.series_id FROM data_points AS dp JOIN dimensions AS t ON t.series_id = dp.series_id AND t.dimension_type = 'ticker' AND t.dimension_code IN ('ETN', 'EMR', 'GE', 'JCI', 'DE', 'KLAC', 'WWD', 'COHR', 'PCAR', 'ROK', 'CAT', 'RTX', 'ALLE') JOIN dimensions AS m ON m.series_id = dp.series_id AND m.dimension_type = 'metric_code' AND m.dimension_code IN ('pretax_income', 'interest_expense', 'net_income', 'dep_amortization') WHERE dp.series_id IN (SELECT series_id FROM series WHERE series_id LIKE '%consolidated_quarterly') AND dp.time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '15 MONTHS') SELECT ticker, SUM(CASE WHEN metric = 'pretax_income' AND rn <= 4 THEN value END) AS ltm_pretax, COUNT(CASE WHEN metric = 'pretax_income' AND rn <= 4 THEN 1 END) AS n_ptx, SUM(CASE WHEN metric = 'interest_expense' AND rn <= 4 THEN value END) AS ltm_int, COUNT(CASE WHEN metric = 'interest_expense' AND rn <= 4 THEN 1 END) AS n_int, SUM(CASE WHEN metric = 'dep_amortization' AND rn <= 4 THEN value END) AS ltm_da, COUNT(CASE WHEN metric = 'dep_amortization' AND rn <= 4 THEN 1 END) AS n_da, SUM(CASE WHEN metric = 'net_income' AND rn <= 4 THEN value END) AS ltm_ni FROM pts GROUP BY ticker ORDER BY ticker
